query: Iran IAEA cooperation law suspension 2025 2026, current state of Iran nuclear inspections and diplomacy, US Iran nuclear deal negotiations status June July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on Iran-IAEA cooperation and US-Iran nuclear diplomacy as of ~July 12, 2026:

**IAEA Cooperation Law**: The suspension law (signed July 2, 2025) remains in force and has NOT been repealed. Iran briefly restored access via the Cairo Agreement (Sept 2025) but terminated it Nov 20, 2025.

**Current Inspections**: Severely restricted—IAEA inspectors access only **two facilities** (Bushehr Power Plant and Tehran Research Reactor). No access to bombed enrichment sites (Fordow, Natanz, Isfahan). Grossi insists inspections "will happen" per the MoU; Iran ties access to a final deal and full sanctions removal.

**US-Iran Diplomacy**: After the 2026 war, the **Islamabad Memorandum (MoU)** was signed June 17, 2026, opening a 60-day window. Indirect talks in Switzerland (~June 23) and Doha (July 1-2) via Qatari mediators showed "positive progress"—a dispute-resolution channel and discussion of releasing **$6 billion** in frozen Iranian assets—but **no final deal**. Next meeting is set for after Khamenei's funeral (began ~July 5).

**Key tensions**: Inspector access to bombed sites, sanctions relief timing, frozen assets, Strait of Hormuz control, and negotiation format (US wants direct; Iran insists on indirect only).

Full synthesis and structured data (12 sources, 8 quantitative data points) have been recorded.

sources.title: Iran president signs law suspending cooperation with IAEA
sources.snippet: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian signed a law suspending cooperation with the IAEA.

sources.title: Iran's Suspension of IAEA Cooperation is a Political Gamble, not a Technical Decision
sources.snippet: On June 25, Iran's parliament approved the 'Suspension of Cooperation with the IAEA' bill 221-1, ratified by the Guardian Council.

sources.title: Iran and Nuclear Opacity: Strategic Ambiguity, Retaliation, and Leverage
sources.snippet: On July 2, 2025, Pezeshkian enacted a law suspending IAEA cooperation until facility security is guaranteed.

sources.title: UN nuclear chief says Iran inspections will happen, Tehran says after deal
sources.snippet: Grossi says MoU explicitly states IAEA will supervise inspections; Iran says only after a final deal.

sources.title: Analysis of IAEA Iran Verification and Monitoring and NPT Safeguards Reports — June 2026
sources.snippet: June 4, 2026 IAEA report: Iran in safeguards violation; cannot verify enriched uranium whereabouts since June 2025; Cairo Agreement terminated Nov 20, 2025.

sources.title: Reports of IAEA access to targeted nuclear sites 'false': Iran Parl. speaker
sources.snippet: Qalibaf: inspectors permitted only at Bushehr and Tehran Research Reactor; access restricted under Iranian law.

sources.title: 2025-2026 Iran-United States negotiations
sources.snippet: Islamabad Memorandum signed June 17, 2026 by Trump and Pezeshkian; multiple rounds of talks and technical meetings.

sources.title: US-Iran negotiations: What's the latest?
sources.snippet: MoU signed June 17, 2026 extended ceasefire 60 days; Iran denies direct talks; Pezeshkian expects $6bn frozen funds released.

sources.title: US-Iran talks in Doha: What were the outcomes and what's next?
sources.snippet: Doha talks: dispute-resolution channel established, $6bn frozen assets discussed, no breakthrough; next meeting after Khamenei funeral.

sources.title: July 1, 2026 - Meetings in Doha, Vance says talks 'going well'
sources.snippet: US officials in Qatar report 'positive progress' on MoU issues via mediators; both sides agree to continue.

sources.title: Nuclear inspectors and frozen assets: What Iran and US can't agree on
sources.snippet: US waived Iranian oil sanctions 60 days; Iran FM says 'no clear schedule' for IAEA inspections after Switzerland talks.

sources.title: IAEA chief says inspections of Iran's nuclear sites 'going to happen'
sources.snippet: Grossi pushes back against Tehran's claim that no inspection agreement was reached, citing the US-Iran framework deal.

data_points.metric: Iranian parliament vote to suspend IAEA cooperation (in favor)
Iranian nuclear facilities currently accessible to IAEA inspectors
Iran uranium enriched to 60% U-235 (last verified pre-strike)
Iran uranium enriched to 20% U-235 (last verified pre-strike)
Iran uranium enriched to 5% U-235 (last verified pre-strike)
Frozen Iranian assets discussed for release in Doha talks
US oil-sanctions waiver duration following first day of talks
Strait of Hormuz commercial vessel movement increase (late June vs prior week)
